business_purpose: Captures and persists incoming leads from multiple acquisition channels (web, mobile, partner APIs). Validates lead data and triggers the initial qualification pipeline.
short_description: Ingests and stores new loan leads from all acquisition channels.
observability_notes: Tracks lead volume per channel via Prometheus counters. Alerts on ingestion error rate > 1%.
known_limitations: Does not deduplicate leads across channels in real time; deduplication runs as an async batch job every 15 minutes.

business_purpose: Runs lightweight eligibility rules against lead data (age, geography, minimum income) to pre-qualify applicants before a full credit analysis. Reduces unnecessary downstream processing.
short_description: Pre-qualifies leads using configurable eligibility rules.
observability_notes: Dashboards track approval/rejection ratios per rule. SLA alert if p99 latency exceeds 500ms.
known_limitations: Rules engine is file-based; changes require a deployment. Migration to a database-backed rules engine is planned.

business_purpose: Manages the canonical customer profile including personal data, contact information, and address history. Acts as the single source of truth for customer identity across the platform.
short_description: Stores and manages canonical customer profiles and personal data.
observability_notes: Read-heavy service; monitors cache hit ratio and DB connection pool saturation.
known_limitations: Address validation is limited to Brazilian addresses. International address support is not yet implemented.

business_purpose: Manages the full lifecycle of a loan proposal from creation through approval. Orchestrates the initial steps of document collection, biometrics, and triggers downstream analysis workflows.
short_description: Manages loan proposal lifecycle and orchestrates the initial origination steps.
observability_notes: Central orchestration service with distributed tracing enabled. Monitors step transition latencies and stuck proposal alerts.
known_limitations: Proposal state machine does not support parallel step execution; steps are sequential which increases end-to-end origination time.

business_purpose: Handles secure upload of customer documents (ID, proof of income, vehicle registration, property deeds) via presigned S3 URLs. Stores metadata in MongoDB and triggers classification.
short_description: Manages secure document upload and storage via presigned URLs.
observability_notes: Monitors upload success rates, file sizes, and S3 presigned URL generation latency.
known_limitations: Maximum file size is 20MB. Multi-page PDFs over 50 pages may timeout during initial processing.

business_purpose: Asynchronously processes uploaded documents through OCR to extract text and structured data fields (name, CPF, income values). Feeds extracted data to the classifier and validation services.
short_description: Extracts text and structured data from uploaded documents using OCR.
observability_notes: Tracks OCR accuracy rates per document type and processing latency histograms. GPU utilization alerts on Tessaract workers.
known_limitations: Handwritten documents have significantly lower extraction accuracy (~60%). Does not support scanned documents with resolution below 150 DPI.

business_purpose: Classifies uploaded documents into predefined categories (identity, proof of income, vehicle registration, property deed, etc.) using ML models and OCR-extracted text.
short_description: Classifies documents into categories using ML and OCR data.
observability_notes: Monitors classification confidence scores distribution and model drift metrics. Alert on confidence below threshold for > 5% of documents.
known_limitations: Model retraining is manual and requires data science team involvement. New document types require 500+ labeled samples.

business_purpose: Validates document authenticity and completeness by cross-referencing extracted data with customer profile and running fraud detection heuristics on document images.
short_description: Validates document authenticity and data consistency against customer records.
observability_notes: Tracks validation pass/fail rates per document type and rule. Alert on sudden increase in rejection rates.
known_limitations: Manual override requires backoffice user role. Override audit trail is stored but not yet exposed via API.

business_purpose: Provides a unified API for storing and retrieving documents and their metadata. Manages document lifecycle including retention policies and encryption at rest.
short_description: Centralized document storage and retrieval with encryption and retention management.
observability_notes: Monitors S3 upload/download latency, storage consumption growth, and MongoDB query performance.
known_limitations: Does not support document versioning diff views. Full document history retrieval can be slow for proposals with 20+ documents.

business_purpose: Manages the biometric data capture workflow including selfie photos and video sessions. Coordinates liveness detection and face matching steps for identity verification.
short_description: Orchestrates biometric data capture and identity verification workflows.
observability_notes: Monitors capture success rates per device type and SDK version. Alerts on liveness check failure spikes.
known_limitations: Requires minimum camera resolution of 720p. Low-light conditions significantly reduce liveness detection accuracy.

business_purpose: Processes captured biometric data to verify the subject is a live person and not a photo, video replay, or mask attack. Uses passive and active liveness detection algorithms.
short_description: Performs liveness detection on biometric captures to prevent spoofing attacks.
observability_notes: Tracks liveness pass/fail rates and average processing time. GPU memory utilization alerts for ML inference pods.
known_limitations: Active liveness challenges are limited to 3 gesture types. Processing time increases to ~5s under high load due to GPU contention.

business_purpose: Compares the captured selfie against the photo extracted from the identity document to confirm the applicant is who they claim to be. Returns a similarity score and match decision.
short_description: Matches selfie photos against ID document photos for identity confirmation.
observability_notes: Monitors similarity score distribution and false accept/reject rates. Alert on model inference latency exceeding 3s.
known_limitations: Accuracy degrades for ID documents older than 10 years due to aging effects. Threshold tuning requires manual A/B testing.

business_purpose: Collects and analyzes device-level signals (browser fingerprint, IP geolocation, device reputation) to detect suspicious devices and session anomalies associated with fraud.
short_description: Analyzes device signals and fingerprints to detect suspicious access patterns.
observability_notes: Real-time dashboard for device risk score distribution. Alert on spike in high-risk device detections (>10% in 5min window).
known_limitations: VPN/proxy detection has ~85% accuracy. Device fingerprint persistence is limited on Safari due to Intelligent Tracking Prevention.

business_purpose: Screens applicants against internal blocklists, PEP (Politically Exposed Persons) lists, sanctions lists, and adverse media databases. Required for AML/KYC compliance.
short_description: Screens applicants against sanctions, PEP, and internal watchlists for AML compliance.
observability_notes: Monitors screening latency and match rates. Regulatory alert on any sanctions list update delay > 24h.
known_limitations: Fuzzy name matching generates false positives for common Brazilian names. Manual review queue can grow during batch processing peaks.

business_purpose: Integrates with external fraud prevention bureaus (Serasa Experian, Quod) to fetch fraud scores, identity confirmation data, and known fraud indicators for applicants.
short_description: Fetches fraud data from external bureaus like Serasa Experian and Quod.
observability_notes: Monitors external bureau API response times, error rates, and circuit breaker state. Alert on bureau timeout rate > 5%.
known_limitations: Subject to external bureau rate limits (500 req/min per bureau). Circuit breaker opens after 3 consecutive failures, fallback returns cached data if available.

business_purpose: Aggregates signals from device fingerprinting, watchlist screening, and bureau data to compute a consolidated fraud risk score using ML models. Provides the score to the fraud decision service.
short_description: Computes a consolidated fraud risk score from multiple fraud signals using ML models.
observability_notes: Monitors score distribution, model prediction latency, and feature drift. A/B testing metrics for model versions.
known_limitations: Model retraining requires minimum 10,000 labeled samples. Cold start issue for completely new fraud patterns not in training data.

business_purpose: Makes the final fraud accept/reject/review decision based on the fraud score and configurable business rules. Routes flagged proposals to manual review in the backoffice.
short_description: Makes final fraud accept/reject/review decisions based on scores and business rules.
observability_notes: Tracks decision distribution (approved/rejected/review), override rates, and rule trigger frequencies.
known_limitations: Override requires fraud analyst role. Decision rules are evaluated sequentially; complex rule sets may cause latency spikes.

business_purpose: Integrates with credit bureaus (Serasa, SPC, Boa Vista) to fetch credit reports, score histories, and outstanding debt information for loan applicants.
short_description: Fetches credit reports and scores from external credit bureaus.
observability_notes: Monitors bureau API latency per provider, cache hit rates on Redis, and circuit breaker transitions.
known_limitations: Bureau data is cached for 24 hours to reduce costs; real-time data requires cache invalidation. Rate limited to 300 req/min per bureau.

business_purpose: Verifies declared income by cross-referencing bureau data, uploaded pay stubs, tax returns, and bank statements. Computes verified income and debt-to-income ratio.
short_description: Verifies and computes applicant income from multiple data sources.
observability_notes: Tracks income verification success rates and discrepancy rates between declared and verified income.
known_limitations: Self-employed income verification relies heavily on tax returns which may be outdated. Bank statement parsing supports only major Brazilian banks.

business_purpose: Computes internal credit scores using ML models that combine bureau data, verified income, fraud signals, and behavioral data. Produces risk tier classification for the policy engine.
short_description: Calculates internal credit risk scores using ML models and aggregated data.
observability_notes: Model performance dashboards track Gini coefficient, KS statistic, and PSI. Alert on score distribution drift exceeding 5% threshold.
known_limitations: Model inference latency is ~2s for the full feature set. Thin-file applicants (< 6 months credit history) receive lower confidence scores.

business_purpose: Evaluates the credit score against configurable lending policies (LTV limits, DTI thresholds, term limits, rate tables) to determine eligible loan products, amounts, and rates.
short_description: Evaluates credit scores against lending policies to determine eligible loan terms.
observability_notes: Monitors policy pass/fail rates per rule and tier. Tracks rate table changes and their impact on approval rates.
known_limitations: Policy changes take effect immediately and cannot be scheduled. No built-in simulation mode for testing policy changes before deployment.

business_purpose: Makes the final credit approval or denial decision based on policy evaluation results. Determines final loan amount, rate, and term. Supports manual override for edge cases.
short_description: Makes final credit approval/denial decisions and determines loan terms.
observability_notes: Tracks approval/denial rates, average approved amounts, and override frequency. Alert on approval rate deviation > 10% from daily baseline.
known_limitations: Override requires credit committee role for amounts above R$500,000. Decision audit log is append-only and cannot be modified.

business_purpose: Orchestrates the collateral appraisal process by routing to the appropriate appraisal service (vehicle or property) based on collateral type and coordinating inspector assignments.
short_description: Routes and coordinates collateral appraisal workflows based on asset type.
observability_notes: Monitors appraisal turnaround time by collateral type and inspector. Alert on orders pending > 48h without inspector assignment.
known_limitations: Inspector assignment is geographic but coverage gaps exist in remote areas. Does not support mixed collateral (vehicle + property) on a single proposal.

business_purpose: Performs vehicle appraisal by integrating with FIPE table data, analyzing vehicle photos, and collecting inspector reports to determine the fair market value of vehicle collateral.
short_description: Appraises vehicle collateral using FIPE data, photos, and inspector reports.
observability_notes: Tracks appraisal valuations vs FIPE reference delta. Monitors FIPE API availability.
known_limitations: FIPE data is updated monthly; intra-month price changes are not reflected. Heavy/specialty vehicles may not have FIPE references.

business_purpose: Performs real estate appraisal by analyzing property registry data, comparable sales, inspector reports, and market indices to determine the fair market value of property collateral.
short_description: Appraises property collateral using market data, comparables, and inspector reports.
observability_notes: Monitors valuation accuracy by comparing appraised values with final sale prices. Tracks inspector report submission SLA.
known_limitations: Comparable sales data coverage is limited in rural areas. AVM (Automated Valuation Model) is only available for urban areas in major metropolitan regions.

business_purpose: Generates structured appraisal reports in PDF format with photos, valuation data, and inspector notes. Stores reports for regulatory compliance and audit purposes.
short_description: Generates and stores PDF appraisal reports for compliance and audit.
observability_notes: Tracks report generation time and failure rates. Monitors S3 storage consumption for appraisal assets.
known_limitations: PDF generation is synchronous and can take up to 30s for reports with many photos. No support for generating reports in formats other than PDF.

business_purpose: Generates loan contract documents by merging approved loan terms, customer data, and collateral details into legally compliant contract templates. Supports multiple collateral types and loan products.
short_description: Generates loan contract documents from templates with approved terms and customer data.
observability_notes: Monitors contract generation latency and template rendering errors. Alert on generation failure rate > 2%.
known_limitations: Template changes require legal review and a new deployment. Supports only Portuguese language contracts.

business_purpose: Validates generated contracts against regulatory requirements (BACEN rules, consumer protection laws, interest rate caps) before they are sent for signature.
short_description: Validates contracts against regulatory requirements before signature.
observability_notes: Tracks compliance violation rates by rule type. Alert on any new violation type not seen in production before.
known_limitations: Rule updates require coordination with legal team and manual regression testing. Does not support real-time regulatory feed integration.

business_purpose: Integrates with digital signature providers (DocuSign, Clicksign) to send contracts for electronic signature. Manages signature workflows, reminders, and collects signed documents.
short_description: Sends contracts for electronic signature via external providers and tracks completion.
observability_notes: Monitors signature completion rates, time-to-sign, and provider webhook reliability. Alert on pending signatures > 72h.
known_limitations: Webhook delivery from external providers can be delayed up to 5 minutes. Fallback polling runs every 10 minutes. Only supports ICP-Brasil digital certificates for advanced signatures.

business_purpose: Stores and manages signed contracts with versioning, immutability guarantees, and retention policies. Provides secure retrieval for audit, regulatory, and customer-facing use cases.
short_description: Stores signed contracts with versioning and immutability for audit and compliance.
observability_notes: Monitors storage growth, retrieval latency, and access patterns. Alert on any write failure to the immutable store.
known_limitations: Contracts are write-once; amendments create new versions rather than modifying existing documents. Search is limited to metadata fields.

business_purpose: Orchestrates the collateral lien registration process by routing to DETRAN (vehicles) or Cartorio (property) integration services and tracking registration status until completion.
short_description: Orchestrates collateral lien registration across DETRAN and Cartorio systems.
observability_notes: Monitors registration completion rates and turnaround times per registry type. Alert on registration stuck > 5 business days.
known_limitations: Cannot cancel a registration in progress once submitted to external systems. Retry logic is limited to 3 attempts before requiring manual intervention.

business_purpose: Integrates with state DETRAN (Department of Transit) systems to register and release vehicle liens. Handles the asynchronous nature of DETRAN responses and state-specific protocols.
short_description: Registers and releases vehicle liens via state DETRAN system integrations.
observability_notes: Monitors per-state DETRAN API availability and response times. Alert on any state system unavailability > 2h during business hours.
known_limitations: Each state has different API protocols and availability windows. Some states (AM, AP, RR) still require manual registration via physical office.

business_purpose: Integrates with Cartorio (notary office) systems to register and release property liens (alienação fiduciária). Manages the complex document exchange required for property registry.
short_description: Registers and releases property liens via Cartorio notary system integrations.
observability_notes: Monitors Cartorio system availability and document acceptance rates. Alert on rejection rate > 10% indicating potential document formatting issues.
known_limitations: Property registration can take 5-30 business days depending on the Cartorio. Many Cartorios lack digital integration, requiring physical document courier.

business_purpose: Tracks the status of all pending lien registrations with periodic polling of external systems. Provides status updates to the orchestrator and generates alerts for stalled registrations.
short_description: Polls and tracks the status of pending lien registrations across external systems.
observability_notes: Monitors polling job execution and stalled registration counts. Dashboard for SLA compliance per registry type.
known_limitations: Polling interval is 1 hour minimum to avoid rate limiting from external systems. Real-time status updates are not available.

business_purpose: Orchestrates the loan disbursement process including final pre-disbursement checks, transfer amount calculation (net of fees and insurance), and coordination with bank transfer integration.
short_description: Orchestrates loan disbursement including pre-checks and transfer coordination.
observability_notes: Monitors disbursement completion time and failure rates. Critical alert on any disbursement stuck in processing > 4h.
known_limitations: Disbursement cannot be partially executed; it is all-or-nothing. Reversals require manual intervention through backoffice.

business_purpose: Integrates with banking systems (PIX, TED, DOC) to execute loan disbursement transfers to borrower accounts. Handles transfer initiation, status tracking, and error handling.
short_description: Executes loan disbursement bank transfers via PIX, TED, and DOC channels.
observability_notes: Monitors transfer success rates per channel (PIX/TED/DOC) and bank. Alert on transfer failure rate > 1% in any 15min window.
known_limitations: TED transfers are limited to banking hours (6:30-17:00 BRT). PIX has a R$1M per-transaction limit. DOC is deprecated but maintained for legacy accounts.

business_purpose: Confirms that bank transfers were successfully credited to borrower accounts by reconciling transfer records with bank statements and settlement files.
short_description: Reconciles and confirms successful disbursement transfers against bank records.
observability_notes: Monitors reconciliation match rates and unmatched transfer counts. Alert on unmatched transfers > 24h old.
known_limitations: Settlement file processing is batch-based (runs every 2h). Real-time confirmation is only available for PIX transfers.

business_purpose: Manages the loan repayment schedule by generating installments (boletos and PIX payment codes), tracking payments, and maintaining the outstanding balance for each active loan.
short_description: Generates installments and tracks loan repayment schedules and balances.
observability_notes: Monitors payment processing success rates, overdue installment growth, and boleto generation errors. Daily alert on total overdue portfolio value.
known_limitations: Boleto registration with banks can take up to 2 business days. Early payoff calculation does not support partial prepayment.

business_purpose: Manages the automated dunning process for overdue installments including configurable escalation workflows (SMS, email, phone call scheduling) based on days past due.
short_description: Automates dunning escalation workflows for overdue loan installments.
observability_notes: Tracks dunning effectiveness by recovery rates per escalation step. Monitors contact attempt success rates.
known_limitations: Escalation rules are time-based only; does not consider customer payment behavior patterns. Maximum 10 escalation steps per dunning workflow.

business_purpose: Manages outbound contact attempts with delinquent borrowers including phone call scheduling, SMS campaigns, and email follow-ups. Tracks contact outcomes for compliance reporting.
short_description: Manages outbound contact attempts with delinquent borrowers across channels.
observability_notes: Monitors contact success rates per channel and time slot. Compliance alert on contacts outside permitted hours.
known_limitations: Phone call scheduling depends on external dialer integration which has limited capacity (200 concurrent calls). WhatsApp channel is not yet supported.

business_purpose: Generates and manages debt negotiation offers for delinquent borrowers. Calculates discount options, new payment plans, and tracks negotiation outcomes.
short_description: Generates debt negotiation offers and manages settlement workflows for delinquent loans.
observability_notes: Tracks negotiation acceptance rates, average discount percentages, and recovery amounts. Dashboard for portfolio recovery projections.
known_limitations: Discount rules have a maximum cap of 40% of outstanding principal. Offers expire after 7 days and cannot be extended.

business_purpose: Manages the legal collections process for severely delinquent loans including protest (cartório protest), lawsuit filing, collateral repossession orders, and integration with law firms.
short_description: Manages legal collections actions including protest, lawsuits, and repossession orders.
observability_notes: Monitors legal case progression, average time to resolution, and recovery rates from legal actions.
known_limitations: Integration with law firm systems is file-based (SFTP CSV exchange). Real-time case status updates depend on manual entry by law firm partners.

business_purpose: Evaluates whether a delinquent borrower qualifies for loan renegotiation based on payment history, current delinquency status, and configurable business policies.
short_description: Evaluates borrower eligibility for loan renegotiation based on policies and history.
observability_notes: Tracks eligibility check volumes and approval rates. Monitors policy rule effectiveness.
known_limitations: A borrower who has already renegotiated twice is automatically ineligible. Policy changes require a service redeployment.

business_purpose: Simulates renegotiation scenarios for eligible borrowers, generating new payment schedules with different term, rate, and discount combinations for borrower selection.
short_description: Simulates renegotiation payment scenarios with various term and rate options.
observability_notes: Monitors simulation volumes, accepted scenario types, and conversion rates from simulation to accepted renegotiation.
known_limitations: Maximum of 5 simulation scenarios per request. Interest rate floor is set by Treasury and cannot go below the minimum spread.

business_purpose: Backend-for-frontend service that aggregates data from multiple backend services to serve the customer-facing portal and mobile app. Handles session management and request orchestration.
short_description: Aggregates backend data for the customer portal and mobile app interfaces.
observability_notes: Monitors API response times, error rates, and concurrent session counts. CDN cache hit ratio for static assets.
known_limitations: Does not support real-time push notifications; client polls every 30 seconds. Session timeout is fixed at 30 minutes.

business_purpose: Backend-for-frontend service that aggregates data from multiple backend services to serve the internal backoffice application used by analysts, operators, and managers.
short_description: Aggregates backend data for the internal backoffice operations application.
observability_notes: Monitors API response times per endpoint and active operator sessions. Alert on response times > 3s for dashboard endpoints.
known_limitations: Bulk operations (e.g., mass case assignment) are limited to 100 items per request. Advanced search requires Elasticsearch which has a 10s query timeout.

business_purpose: Manages operational cases that require human intervention including fraud reviews, credit exceptions, document re-submissions, and customer complaints. Provides work queues and SLA tracking.
short_description: Manages operational cases requiring human review with work queues and SLA tracking.
observability_notes: Monitors case resolution times by type, queue depths, and SLA compliance rates. Alert on queue depth > 50 unassigned cases.
known_limitations: Case routing rules are static and based on case type only; does not consider operator skill or current workload. Maximum 20 concurrent cases per operator.

business_purpose: Captures and stores immutable audit events from all services for regulatory compliance, security investigation, and operational troubleshooting. Provides search and reporting capabilities.
short_description: Captures and stores immutable audit events from all platform services.
observability_notes: Monitors Elasticsearch cluster health, indexing lag, and storage consumption. Alert on indexing lag > 5 minutes.
known_limitations: Full-text search performance degrades for queries spanning more than 90 days. Index rotation is monthly; older data moves to cold storage after 1 year.

business_purpose: Sends notifications to customers and internal users across multiple channels (email, SMS, push, WhatsApp) based on events from other services. Manages delivery tracking and retry logic.
short_description: Delivers notifications across email, SMS, push, and WhatsApp channels.
observability_notes: Monitors delivery rates per channel, bounce rates, and provider API errors. Alert on delivery success rate < 95% for any channel.
known_limitations: WhatsApp Business API has a 24h messaging window restriction. SMS delivery to some rural carriers has higher failure rates. Push notification delivery is fire-and-forget.

business_purpose: Manages notification templates for all channels with support for variable substitution, localization, and A/B testing of message variants.
short_description: Manages notification message templates with variable substitution and A/B testing.
observability_notes: Monitors template rendering errors and cache hit rates. Low traffic service with basic health monitoring.
known_limitations: Template rendering does not support conditional logic beyond simple if/else. Maximum template size is 10KB.

business_purpose: Provides centralized authentication (OAuth2/OIDC) and authorization (RBAC) for all platform services. Manages user sessions, API keys, and service-to-service authentication via JWT tokens.
short_description: Provides centralized OAuth2 authentication and RBAC authorization for the platform.
observability_notes: Monitors login success/failure rates, token issuance volume, and Redis session store latency. Alert on brute force detection (>10 failed logins per IP in 5min).
known_limitations: Does not support multi-factor authentication via hardware tokens (only TOTP and SMS). Session revocation propagation can take up to 60s due to JWT caching.

business_purpose: Provides centralized feature flag management for controlled rollouts, A/B testing, and kill switches across all platform services. Supports user-level, percentage-based, and environment-based targeting.
short_description: Manages feature flags for controlled rollouts and A/B testing across services.
observability_notes: Monitors flag evaluation latency (target p99 < 5ms) and cache hit rates. Dashboard for active flags and their rollout status.
known_limitations: Flag evaluation is eventually consistent; changes propagate within 10 seconds. Maximum 500 active flags. Complex targeting rules with > 10 conditions may impact evaluation performance.
